rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex closing tags when they are the only issue.
generic_rules: Repair only the specific diagnostic issue, do not change unrelated architecture.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex when fixing guarantees.
Move implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex when they are valid in that scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture to fix guarantees; remove invalid guarantees instead.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-level references in component type annexes.
